articles.title: Evacuees of Ontario’s Wildfires Wait and Worry
articles.description: Flames crept, and then sprinted, toward unsuspecting residents who fled remote parts of northwestern Ontario. Now they want to know why officials weren’t prepared.

articles.title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
articles.description: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.

articles.title: Houthis in Yemen Edge Closer to Entering U.S.-Iran War

articles.title: Trump Rejected Nearly 6,000 Clemency Applications Amid Hope of Pardon Wave
articles.description: Expectations were raised for a raft of pardons in connection with the country’s 250th birthday but the president granted fewer than 20 on July 3.

articles.title: Burnham, UK’s New Prime Minister, Starts With Electricity Tax Cut
articles.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham moved quickly to confront the high cost of living. And President Trump wished him well after a phone call between the two leaders.

articles.title: How Two Brothers Dug for Dead Relatives: With a Shovel and a Kitchen Knife
articles.description: After Venezuela’s devastating earthquakes, Winder and Deivi Delfín dug every day for 26 days to find the bodies of their mother, brother and grandmother.

articles.description: We look at the American casualties in the war with Iran.

articles.title: Pentagon Identifies 2 U.S. Soldiers Killed in Jordan During Iran Strike
articles.description: Both were active-duty soldiers, the Defense Department said. They were killed in action after an Iranian strike on a base in Jordan on Friday.

articles.title: Trump’s Kiss of Death
articles.description: On top of everything else, the president is inept.

articles.title: Lebanese Troops Deploy in Israeli-Held Village Under New Cease-Fire Plan
articles.description: The Israeli military withdrew from the village under a U.S.-brokered deal to transfer control of occupied areas back to Lebanon after months of war. But Hezbollah has rejected the truce.

articles.title: A Family’s Daring Escape From North Korea

articles.title: The U.S. Is Pulling Back on Energy Efficiency

articles.title: How a 911 Call Led to the Nation’s Strictest Trans Bathroom Law

articles.title: CrashStealer Mac malware steals passwords and wallets
articles.description: CrashStealer Mac malware uses a signed Werkbit installer and fake password prompt to steal Keychain data, browser credentials and cryptocurrency wallets.

articles.title: The war on America’s Judeo-Christian roots threatens everything we share
